title: paspalum tillettii
intro: Paspalum tillettii is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, native to South America. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum tillettii include its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Paspalum tillettii typically involve the use of its leaves and stems in teas, infusions, and topical applications.
